data.title: SLTV: Simonetta Lein's "Built This Without Permission" Dress at the 2026 Grammys Sparks Conversation About Independence and Creative Authorship
data.description: On March 6, 2026 in Los Angeles, media personality Simonetta Lein made waves at the 2026 Grammys with a statement-making gown that captivated audiences. The gown, adorned with prominent phrases such as "Built This..." became a focal point of discussion, sparking attention and recognition. Simonetta Lein's fashion choice blended creativity with a powerful message, garnering significant social media buzz and acclaim within the fashion and entertainment industry.

data.title: Lisata Therapeutics Enters into Definitive Agreement to be Acquired by Kuva Labs, Inc.
data.description: Every shareholder of Lisata will receive $5.00 in cash per share upon closure of the deal, along with a contingent value right for a potential extra cash payment of $1.00 per share.

data.title: Aetherflux Appoints Matthew Seaford to Advisory Board
data.description: SAN CARLOS, California - Aetherflux, the orbital energy infrastructure company established by Baiju Bhatt, co-founder of Robinhood, has appointed Matthew Seaford to its Advisory Board. As Aetherflux expands its goal to create the initial American space power grid, enhancing energy distribution for terrestrial requirements and orbital AI computation, Seaford's addition is significant. This move arrives at a crucial juncture for Aetherflux, subsequent to the company's recent accomplishments.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Sinks As EU Makes Trump Tariff Move; IBM Dives On This AI Threat (Live Coverage)
data.description: Stock market indexes, such as the Dow Jones industrials, experienced significant declines today. The EU imposed tariffs reminiscent of Trump's policies. Novo's stock faced a decline, while gold investments performed well. This all occurred amid reports of IBM struggling due to an AI threat, causing concerns for investors.

data.title: RCI Banque issues EUR 900M fixed rate notes due Feb 2032.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 4.2%. The number of new jobs created in the last quarter exceeded expectations, with over 300,000 positions added to the job market. Additionally, the stock market witnessed a surge, with the main index reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Experts predict that this positive trend is indicative of a strong and growing economy.

data.title: RCI BANQUE: Emtn Base Prospectus 2025
data.description: RCI Banque has released its EMTN base prospectus for 2025, which can be accessed on the website www.mobilize-fs.com. The prospectus is dated December 18th, 2025, and contains important information for investors and individuals interested in the company's financial activities. Accessing the prospectus on the website will provide detailed insights into RCI Banque's financial operations and strategies for the year, serving as a valuable resource for stakeholders.

data.title: VEON Upgraded to Nasdaq Global Select Market, Enhancing Investor Visibility
data.description: The global digital operator, VEON Ltd. (Nasdaq: VEON), revealed on December 18, 2025, that its American Depositary Shares (ADSs) will move to the Nasdaq Global Select Market of the Nasdaq Stock Market at the start of trading.

data.title: XAI Octagon Floating Rate & Alternative Income Trust Announces 1-For-5 Reverse Stock Split and Effective Date
data.description: On March 6, 2026, XAI Octagon Floating Rate & Alternative Income Trust disclosed a 1-for-5 reverse stock split for its common shares of beneficial interest with a par value of $0.01 per share. The Trust's Board of Trustees sanctioned this move, marked by the trading symbol NYSE: XFLT.

data.title: Ardmore Shipping Files 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda on March 6, 2026, Ardmore Shipping Corporation (NYSE: ASC) revealed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the period concluding on December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: Eversource Statement on Proposed Final Decision to Approve Aquarion Sale
data.description: In Hartford, Connecticut and Boston, a recent proposal by the Connecticut Public Utilities Regulatory Authority (PURA) has approved the sale of Aquarion Water Company to the South Central Connecticut Regional Water Authority. Eversource Energy (NYSE: ES) responded to this proposed final decision, expressing optimism. The statement was issued by Eversource Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, and Treasurer John Moreira. This development marks a positive progress in the Aquarion case.

data.title: Inovalis Real Estate Investment Trust Provides Update on Arcueil Withholding Tax Matter and Appeal
data.description: Inovalis Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) disclosed today that the Paris Administrative Court has made a decision concerning withholding tax reassessments tied to the Arcueil property for tax years 2017 to 2019. During this period, the REIT owned a 25% stake in the property via a joint venture. The Court affirmed a tax obligation totaling around €5.888 million ($9.294 million), encompassing the principal amount, penalties, and interest.
